description_long: This is a stylized drum set consisting of several polygonal drums and two golden-yellow cymbals mounted on silver stands. The drums are primarily red with gray rims and are arranged in a typical kit configuration, including a large bass drum, two toms, a snare, and a floor tom. The cymbals are flat, square-shaped, and supported by tripod stands. The overall design is geometric and angular, with each drum and cymbal having a faceted, low-poly appearance. The stands and supports are metallic gray, giving the set a modern, industrial look. The set appears compact and suitable for use in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or public performance spaces.
description: A geometric, red and gray drum set with polygonal drums and two golden cymbals on metallic stands. The set is compact and visually striking, with a modern, angular design.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the drum set from the side, highlighting the large bass drum and the side profile of the cymbals and toms.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the drum set from the front, clearly displaying the arrangement of all drums and both cymbals.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a rear angle, showing the backs of the drums and the structure of the cymbal stands.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a diagonal perspective, emphasizing the bass drum and the side of the floor tom and cymbal.
